prompt:
Oriental ink fantasy style illustration, black and gray low saturation tones, rice paper texture, old mural texture, ink wash, graininess, overall ethereal, profound, mysterious, and quiet. In the foreground is the back of a character standing in a scene; the middle ground has [architectural/prop elements]; a giant statue/phantom/historical figure/Buddha/cavalry silhouette emerges in the distance. The main subject has a translucent layered silhouette effect, as if condensed from mist, ink, and soft light, with blurred edges naturally merging into the background. Thin mist, water vapor, smoke, birds, petals, and tiny light spots float in the frame, with rich layers and profound space. The overall tone is mainly gray-black and cool blue-gray, with local accents of low-saturation gold and off-white glimmer. The atmosphere is compassionate, fateful, solemn, and poetic, with cinematic depth composition and an Oriental ghost story feel; painterly, ethereal, translucent layered silhouettes, misty atmosphere, subtle gold accents, cinematic depth, high detail, soft diffused light, vertical composition.

Subject: Guanyin 3:4
